---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the situation or friction point. Who runs into this, and how often?

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see added or changed?

## Alternatives you've considered

Any other approaches you thought about, and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, or links that help illustrate the request.
